tooltip.usefultoolsmod.paper_tool: 25% shatter chance on hit. Paper cuts inflict Wither. Weakness while held.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.feather_tool: Grants Slow Falling while held. Hits launch targets upward.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.glass_tool: +2 bonus damage. Shatters at low durability dealing 3 AoE damage.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.sponge_tool: Absorbs nearby water in rain/water, repairing the tool. +3 damage in water.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.nether_wart_tool: Inflicts Wither on hit. Causes Hunger while held.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.dripstone_tool: 30% armor piercing. Enhanced critical hits while falling.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.rabbit_hide_full_: Full Set: Jump Boost III + Speed I + No Fall Damage
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.cactus_armor: Deals 0.5 thorns damage per piece to attackers.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.cactus_full_set: Full Set: Damages nearby hostile mobs.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.bone_full_set: Full Set: Weakens nearby undead mobs.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.nether_brick_tool: Sets targets on fire for 4 seconds.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.nether_brick_full: Full Set: Permanent Fire Resistance. Attackers catch fire.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.copper_full_set: Full Set: Strength I during thunderstorms.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.phantom_tool: Slow Falling while held. +2 damage at night.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.magma_cream_tool: Sets targets on fire + Slowness on hit.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.magma_cream_full_: Full Set: Attackers catch fire + Slowness.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.slime_full_set: Full Set: No fall damage. Attackers are bounced away.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.blaze_tool: Sets targets on fire for 6 seconds.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.blaze_full_set: Full Set: Strength I. Attackers catch fire.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.nautilus_tool: Conduit Power while held in water.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.nautilus_full_set: Full Set: Dolphin's Grace. Aquatic mobs ignore you.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.purpur_tool: 10% chance to teleport target. No fall damage while held.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.purpur_full_set: Full Set: 20% chance to dodge attacks via teleport.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.ghast_tear_tool: Regeneration while held. Heals 1 heart on hit.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.ghast_tear_full_s: Full Set: Regeneration II + Absorption II.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.eye_of_ender_tool: Night Vision while held. 15% Blindness on hit.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.eye_of_ender_full: Full Set: Endermen neutral. Nearby mobs glow.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.shulker_tool: Launches targets skyward on hit. Haste while mid-air.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.shulker_full_set: Full Set: Jump Boost III + Slow Falling + No fall damage. Attackers levitate.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.turtle_scute_full: Full Set: Conduit Power II + Dolphin's Grace. Guardians ignore you.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.echo_shard_tool: Darkness on hit. Nearby entities glow.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.echo_shard_full_s: Full Set: Warden neutral. Nearby entities glow. Attackers blinded.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.dragon_breath_too: Wither II + Poison on hit + AoE cloud. Strength + Fire Resistance while held.
tooltip.usefultoolsmod.dragon_breath_ful: Full Set: Strength II + Resistance II. Attackers withered + burned.
